Step 10: inv(🪨 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv((🧶 ⊗ 🪩)))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🫧)))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪼 ⊞ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ 🐌))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ 🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: inv((🪻 ⊛ 🪼)) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪼) ⊗ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 14: inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🪼) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv((🪼 ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 15: inv((🪼 ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(🪼)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: inv(🪼) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 9: (🪤 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (inv(🫑) ⊗ 🪭))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🪤 ⊛ (inv(🫑) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (🐌 ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv]
Step 12: (🪤 ⊛ (🐌 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪤 ⊛ 🦎) = inv(🪤 ⊕ 🦎)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 14: inv(🪤 ⊕ 🦎) = inv(🫑)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: inv(🫑) = 🐌    [by inv]
Final Output: 🐌

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙)))    [by rot]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪭)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪭) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🧁) = 🥟    [by inv]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🧊)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌)))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸))))    [by rot]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑)))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🫑)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🐌))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🐌)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🪸)    [by rot]
Step 15: (🪆 ⊗ 🪸) = 🫑    [by ⊗ table]
Final Output: 🫑

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🪵))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🧿)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🧿))) = inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🧿)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🧿))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🧿)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🧿))) = inv(rot(🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: inv(rot(🪈)) = inv(🫐)    [by rot]
Step 15: inv(🫐) = 🧿    [by inv]
Final Output: 🧿

Step 8: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((🪻 ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((🪻 ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((🪻 ⊕ 🪻)))    [by inv]
Step 12: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot((🪻 ⊕ 🪻))) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(🦎))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(🦎)) = (inv(🧶) ⊗ 🌵)    [by rot]
Step 14: (inv(🧶) ⊗ 🌵) = (🦎 ⊗ 🌵)    [by inv]
Step 15: (🦎 ⊗ 🌵) = 🪈    [by ⊗ table]
Final Output: 🪈

Step 8: (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv((🧊 ⊞ 🪣)))) ⊕ (🐙 ⊕ 🐙)) = (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv((🧊 ⊞ 🪣)))) ⊕ 🐙)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv((🧊 ⊞ 🪣)))) ⊕ 🐙) = (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🧊 ⊗ 🪣))))) ⊕ 🐙)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🧊 ⊗ 🪣))))) ⊕ 🐙) = (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🐙))))) ⊕ 🐙)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (inv((🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🐙))))) ⊕ 🐙) = (inv((🐙 ⊗ 🧄))) ⊕ 🐙)    [by inv table]
Step 12: (inv((🐙 ⊗ 🧄))) ⊕ 🐙) = (inv(🪣)) ⊕ 🐙)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (inv(🪣)) ⊕ 🐙) = (🪺) ⊕ 🐙)    [by inv table]
Step 14: (🪺 ⊕ 🐙) = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]
Final Output: 🧊

Step 9: (rot((🥟 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(🪭))    [by rot]
Step 13: (🪭 ⊞ inv(🪭)) = (🪭 ⊞ 🧊)    [by inv]
Step 14: (🪭 ⊞ 🧊) = ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🧊) = (🪈 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: (🪈 ⊕ 🧊) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈
